leakage_noise.note: Feature selection on all rows before CV. Data is 100% random; truth = 0.50.

group_leak.note: Same model; only the splitter changed. Negative R2 = worse than predicting the mean.

time_leak.note: Shuffling hourly data lets the model train on the future.

nested.note: best_score_ is a selection score; nested CV is the honest generalization estimate.
